name: Fiera Milano SpA
summary: Fiera Milano SpA, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the exhibition and congress industry in Italy and internationally. It operates through Italian Exhibitions Business, Foreign Exhibitions Business, Media, and Congresses segments. The company is involved in organizing and hosting exhibitions, fairs, and other events; promoting and making available equipped exhibition spaces; and staging exhibitions, as well as offers project support, ancillary, and end services to exhibitors and visitors. It also produces content; and offers online and offline publishing, destination management and logistics, stand-fitting, technical, and other exhibition site services. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Rho, Italy.
